default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss feedback on content produced by fwd.digital for Breyta and explore ways to improve the process and output quality.](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Breyta expressed disappointment with the quality of articles produced, citing inaccuracies, verbosity, and misalignment with their tone of voice](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [fwd.digital acknowledged the shortcomings and committed to improving their process, leveraging their robust AI systems and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to recalibrate expectations and focus on delivering higher-quality content, starting with more programmatic pieces](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Concerns

  - [Breyta found multiple inaccuracies about UX research and AI capabilities in the articles](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Issues with verbosity and repetition were noted, even within short sections](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Content didn't align with Breyta's tone of voice, despite provided guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Some linked sources didn't support the statements made in the articles](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Generation Process

  - [Utilizes a complex workflow involving AI models, research agents, and multiple processing steps](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Includes validating input, setting parameters, breaking down research questions, and aggregating results](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Uses various APIs and knowledge bases to gather and process relevant information](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Allows for post-processing adjustments to improve output quality](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Comparison with Manual Content Creation

  - [Breyta demonstrated creating a higher-quality article in under a minute using ChatGPT and their tone of voice document](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [This highlighted the need for fwd.digital to improve their output to match or exceed manual efforts](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)

### Next Steps for Improvement

  - [fwd.digital to review and adjust their content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Focus on more programmatic content pieces (e.g., profiles, resources) to showcase strengths](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Update company briefing information to prevent misinterpretation of Breyta's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Recalibrate expectations and deliver substantially improved content in the next iteration](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to internally review and adjust their content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Breyta to provide any additional feedback in the coming days](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [fwd.digital to deliver improved content samples, focusing on programmatic pieces](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting in early next week to review progress and realign expectations](https://fathom.video/share/vEwDKi6mHHY58m9oVBmqT3s9NgG6nwsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

action_items.description: Review content gen process w/ CTO Daniel. Rerun articles w/ adjustments. Prepare "best foot forward" approach for next meeting.
Shift focus to programmatic content (profiles, podcasts, books, resources). Prepare examples for next meeting.
Schedule follow-up meeting for end of week to recalibrate approach & review improvements.
Continue updating company briefing info in Notion. Remove incorrect language from landing pages used as AI input.
